name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal=2C=20DNC=20National=20Political=20&=20Organizing=20Director?=
subject: DNC Update - Convention Wrap Up & Counter Messaging Training⚡
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2eab5c9dad8d/dnc-update-convention-wrap-up-counter-messaging-training?e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Dear Partners and Allies-

What an incredible week! Tonight, we announced that more than 122 million people watched our convention live, 1.1 million people texted 30330 and there were 700,000 unique visits to our polling look up site, IWillVote.com, over the four nights!

In so many good ways, it was an “unconventional convention.” A Newsweek [article](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=79e87c894d&e=d6c5c7d7ec) drew attention to the record levels of audience participation-- “no one could have predicted one result: the explosion of participation in caucuses, a vital element of the Party's operation.”

This convention, as they are meant to do, sharpened our choices and the contrasts between the two major parties and those who lead them and our country. We saw clearly Vice President Biden’s vision for the future - how he and Senator Harris will build our country back better.

So now that our exciting event is over, I’m sure you’re wondering, how do we keep the momentum going and leverage the power of our party moving forward?

Next week is the RNC Convention (August 24-27) and that Trump’s only strategy is to spread lies and fear. The DNC War Room is not having it. Which is why this evening the DNC War Room and the Biden campaign announced a slate of counter convention programming, during next week’s Republican National Convention, to remind Americans that Trump has really only delivered on one thing — a Chaos Presidency.

And we need your help. People are fired up after this convention! If you’re like me you even have distant relatives texting you about it. They want something to do now to help defeat Trump and we have it. Please invite your activists to join us this Sunday for a training on how to become a counter messager to the Republican convention.

Our week of programming will involve new television and digital ads, as well as, a host of briefings led by prominent leaders.

Yours in the Fight,

**Mũthoni **

---
|
---
| **DNC Best Practices Institute Presents:
_How to Break Down Trump's Chaos, Lift Up Biden Harris 2020 and Spot Misinformation and Disinformation_**
---
| _"Research shows our brains are not hard-wired to understand logic or retain facts for very long. Our brains are wired to understand and retain stories. A story is a journey that moves the listener...and the result is persuasion and sometimes action."_ -Stanford Business School Professor Jennifer Aaker
Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you to help tell their stories and to move your friends, family and as many other people as you can to an action--voting!
**We will help you...**
First, we will train you this Sunday on the ways you can storytell and amplify; then we'll share critical insight on the misinformation and disinformation that's trying to harm the election of Vice President Biden and Senator Harris and how to spot it.

**When: This Sunday, August 23rd, 2:00 p.m. ET**
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c2fe424453&e=d6c5c7d7ec "REGISTER HERE")
---
| Following this training, the next day, you can start to use it! We will provide you with daily updates and themes for talking about how Trump has cost us American lives, jobs, and stability. As well as, easy to share portions of Vice President Biden's plans that you can use in your storytelling.

In fact, each day of the Republican convention, the DNC will focus on a separate crisis that Trump’s chaos has created or made worse. We will also release television and digital ads that you can share. And you'll see us holding Trump and Republican convention speakers accountable for any lies and misinformation, as we'll be fact checking in real time.

We want to be a resource to organizations like yours and provide tools and messaging to help present the facts and share real life stories. [This RNC Counter Convention Message Toolkit](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2bfd00c8b1&e=d6c5c7d7ec) outlines the 5 steps that your organization can take to amplify the themes we’ll focus on next week via your constituents and partners, social media, newsletters, retweets, and more.

We look forward to having folks join us on Sunday and again next week!
---
|
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2020 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=2eab93f60d).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)
---
|
---

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Late Notice: Hugo Rally Tomorrow is Still On!
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hugo_rally&n=1)
---
Peter \-- I wouldn't usually send out a last minute email, but there's an important issue to bring to your attention. **A Republican Senator put together a pro-America rally on Saturday morning to counter the grotesque protest thrown last weekend by DFL candidate John Thompson. Remember his words..**. "Don’t run now. Don’t run now racist white people. I’m here. Oh yeah, we pull up. We pulled the f– up,” [Thompson continued](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkLfjac_hOXOCluyVZcQGd6WAol791J3J6wmamka8qNjuorzrY2D5d9qZlgT7xRUNmHpZZfpHn7AdIITMKM65vxPhhykgOg3y_TDJ0sEOzBiPfcwjxpATFOdoOL_Jd7UwzA&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hugo_rally&n=2). “Blue lives ain’t s–, and if people here don’t support black people, f– Hugo, Minnesota.” The event was growing in popularity, which triggered the leftists, so they started to send out threatening messages to the organizers. Instead of standing up to these radicals, Senator Chamberlain sent out a message late this afternoon that he was cancelling the event. **Can you believe that! Cowering in the face of the radicals! We've lost this country if patriots can't peacefully rally in a community like Hugo.** If we as Americans don't start standing up to these BLM and ANTIFA bullies, then we will lose it all. Fortunately, our allied groups [MAGASOTA](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOV6WqaJ9uUvOr4o8AB1Ncyh1SQAXxnMf5ttWokj4CzOEw&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hugo_rally&n=3) and the [Recall Walz team](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOUV5fygwDtlMHw9p8bACokrJdkuCxs96nMuaG1hClFv0A&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hugo_rally&n=4) decided to move forward with the event. In case you are hearing mixed messages, let me be clear, the Hugo Pro-America rally will still happen tomorrow. Here are the details:
### WHERE: Hugo Lion's Park, 5524 Upper 146th St N, Hugo, MN 55038
### WHEN: Saturday, August 22nd at 10 am
**[Link to Facebook event](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOV6WqaJ9uUvOr4o8AB1Ncyh1SQAXxnMf5ttWokj4CzOEw&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hugo_rally&n=5)** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hugo_rally&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hugo_rally&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hugo_rally&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Biden for President
subject: Michelle Obama’s Powerful Call-to-Action →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Help us demonstrate an overwhelming amount of grassroots support today: |
---
**Peter -- did you see what former First Lady Michelle Obama said this week at the Democratic National Convention?** | [](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed49/1972204537/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-vote-for-joe-mo-email?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.21_B5_MOgif_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.21_B5_MOgif_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
**[So we're asking you directly, Peter, will you answer Michelle Obama's powerful call-to-action, and say, "Yes, I'm a vote for Joe Biden this fall"](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed49/1972204537/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-vote-for-joe-mo-email?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.21_B5_MOgif_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.21_B5_MOgif_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")?**
[Sign On: I'm a Vote for Joe Biden »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed48/1972204537/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-vote-for-joe-mo-email?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.21_B5_MOgif_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.21_B5_MOgif_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
If Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are going to cement a path to 270 electoral votes, then we're going to need every single Team Joe supporter to stand up today and proudly declare that they're going to vote for the Democratic ticket this fall.

And that's why we're looking directly at you, Peter. You're one of our top grassroots supporters -- and you have a powerful voice in the outcome of this election.

So even if you've answered a question like this in the past, it's important that we continue to update our data on who we can count on across the country, which is why we're asking you again, and why we hope you'll confirm below.

[**Sign on today to say you 're voting for Joe Biden, and help us demonstrate an overwhelming amount of grassroots support today:**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed49/1972204537/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-vote-for-joe-mo-email?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.21_B5_MOgif_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.21_B5_MOgif_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
[Sign On: I'm a Vote for Joe Biden »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed48/1972204537/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-vote-for-joe-mo-email?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.21_B5_MOgif_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.21_B5_MOgif_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Thank you!

_\-- Biden for President_
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed47/1972204537/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed46/1972204537/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed45/1972204537/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed44/1972204537/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed43/1972204537/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed42/1972204537/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed41/1972204537/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed40/1972204537/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed3f/1972204537/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed3e/1972204537/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed41/1972204537/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed3d/1972204537/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed40/1972204537/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b743/1cd0ac28/16bc676b9/357fed3c/1972204537/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President
clean_body: Help us demonstrate an overwhelming amount of grassroots support today: | Peter -- did you see what former First Lady Michelle Obama said this week at the Democratic National Convention? | "" ""? "" If Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are going to cement a path to 270 electoral votes, then we're going to need every single Team Joe supporter to stand up today and proudly declare that they're going to vote for the Democratic ticket this fall. And that's why we're looking directly at you, Peter. You're one of our top grassroots supporters -- and you have a powerful voice in the outcome of this election. So even if you've answered a question like this in the past, it's important that we continue to update our data on who we can count on across the country, which is why we're asking you again, and why we hope you'll confirm below. "" "" Thank you! \-- Biden for President | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Terry Neese
subject: The difference between winning and losing
body:
Dear Friend,

The runoff election is Tuesday.

The most important thing our victory depends on is your VOTE.

While our campaign has an excellent Get Out The Vote (GOTV) program, we’re near the end of this runoff and are counting on your last minute support to ensure every last vote is turned out and counted!

Will you chip in to help fund our GOTV program?

GOTV - $10 [https://secure.winred.com/neese-for-congress/6b3598ba1cb0a107] GOTV - $20 [https://secure.winred.com/neese-for-congress/6b3598ba1cb0a107] GOTV - $50 [https://secure.winred.com/neese-for-congress/6b3598ba1cb0a107]

The more you can chip in, the more voters we can make sure get to the polls and help us WIN on Tuesday!

name: Team Hicks
subject: RE: 19 counties
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Democrats are working together to flip critical seats across the state of Kentucky this November.

|
---

| | Friends, Earlier this week, Amy McGrath shared why she's supporting Josh to represent Kentucky's 6th District in Congress, and how strong turnout in the 6th District can help take down Mitch McConnell. Take a look at Amy's message below! **[_Then, if you can, chip in to our campaign to help flip the 6th District today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18800469/240094317/2073148045?refcode=fl_em_fr_20200822McGrath2_TH_all_xx_xx_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTJjYjFjYi03ZmU0LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oyGvWAlpYWISwrwTr9XcYd_DdZYbsBZ2sQd_WP2ZUI=)** Thank you always for your support, Team Hicks \----------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: Amy McGrath
Date: August 20, 2020
Subject: 19 counties [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18800470/240094318/2073148045?refcode=fl_em_fr_20200822McGrath2_TH_all_xx_xx_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTJjYjFjYi03ZmU0LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8oyGvWAlpYWISwrwTr9XcYd_DdZYbsBZ2sQd_WP2ZUI=) Friends, I’ve got some incredible news about my friend Josh Hicks, who’s running to defeat Mitch McConnell’s former intern in Kentucky’s 6th District: According to recent polling, **Josh’s race has pulled to a statistical tie—and he’s leading among the folks we most need to swing this race in November.** That’s huge. Josh’s opponent, Andy Barr, has near-universal name recognition and a national Republican money machine behind him. Even up against those advantages, an underdog challenger like Josh has completely erased the polling gap. Josh knows what it’s like to struggle to put food on the table, and in this critical moment, he's going to be a voice for regular Kentuckians—not for special interests. **Draining the swamp starts with taking down Mitch McConnell and everyone he’s enabled to get ahead in Washington. | Peter,
It's clear that we are facing an unprecedented crisis brought on by the Chinese coronavirus. Almost every single American has been affected in some way by the virus, yet Nancy Pelosi and the do-nothing Democrats have stalled multiple relief bills just so they can give trillions of dollars away to their liberal donors and fund their far-left pet projects.
I went on FoxNews to talk about Congressional Democrats' demands and their shameful behavior.

Almost every single American has been affected in some way by the virus, yet Nancy Pelosi and the do-nothing Democrats have stalled multiple relief bills just so they can give trillions of dollars away to their liberal donors and fund their far-left pet projects. I went on FoxNews to talk about Congressional Democrats' demands and their shameful behavior. | == | | | == | Thankfully, President Trump has stepped in to help out American workers and families who are struggling during this time, but Congressional Democrats need to get their acts together and work with us on bipartisan coronavirus relief. name: Team Sri
subject: 73 days left to make a choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
There are 73 days left until Election Day, friend -- and we can’t stress enough what our choices mean for Texas families.

On one hand, we have a proven leader for our district and nation who has dedicated his career to public service, restoring America’s global standing, and fighting for Texas families on issues like expanding health care and rebuilding our economy. That’s our candidate, Sri Kulkarni.
And on the other hand, we have Troy Nehls.

Troy Nehls is a police officer who was fired for mishandling evidence and lied about it on a future job application. He’s run a divisive, hateful campaign while appealing to corporate interests -- and as a pandemic rages through our district, he has repeatedly denied or downplayed its debilitating effects on our health and our livelihoods, even as his own employees have gotten sick.

Our choice is clear: We need Sri Preston Kulkarni in Congress. And we need you to stand with us. Chip in now to make your choice clear.

CHIP IN NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.22_ts_b1_all&amount=15

As this pandemic decimates our economy and way of life, we need a leader who will ensure that Congress passes policies based on the scientific advice of health care experts that will prioritize working families. That means we need a leader who knows the struggles working-class Texans face.

Sri is that leader.

Born into a middle-class family, Sri grew up in our district and knows firsthand the struggles many of us face. After his father died, the medical bills from his care overwhelmed his family. Now, Sri is fighting to ensure that everyone has access to affordable healthcare and that we rebuild our economy for working families.

We don’t need to send someone to Washington who will curry favor with dark money interests and fuel conspiracy theories about this pandemic for their own political gain. We need someone who ensures that our lives and livelihoods are at the forefront of our agenda.

The choice is clear -- we need Sri Preston Kulkarni in Congress. And in 74 days, we can send him there, but only with your support.

CHIP IN NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.22_ts_b1_all&amount=15

Thanks,
-- Team Sri

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.22_ts_b1_all&amount=15

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d7a0db35-ffe3-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/878e38fc-90e4-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzhlMzhmYy05MGU0LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6lyUfD1D-eyvCqldDEAIplD-o0fUoY-65ga3Pgh2Hmk=&id=117373579 .

That’s our candidate, Sri Kulkarni. And on the other hand, we have Troy Nehls. Troy Nehls is a police officer who was fired for mishandling evidence and lied about it on a future job application. He’s run a divisive, hateful campaign while appealing to corporate interests -- and as a pandemic rages through our district, he has repeatedly denied or downplayed its debilitating effects on our health and our livelihoods, even as his own employees have gotten sick. Our choice is clear: We need Sri Preston Kulkarni in Congress. And we need you to stand with us. Chip in now to make your choice clear. CHIP IN NOW >> As this pandemic decimates our economy and way of life, we need a leader who will ensure that Congress passes policies based on the scientific advice of health care experts that will prioritize working families. That means we need a leader who knows the struggles working-class Texans face. Sri is that leader. Born into a middle-class family, Sri grew up in our district and knows firsthand the struggles many of us face. After his father died, the medical bills from his care overwhelmed his family. Now, Sri is fighting to ensure that everyone has access to affordable healthcare and that we rebuild our economy for working families. We don’t need to send someone to Washington who will curry favor with dark money interests and fuel conspiracy theories about this pandemic for their own political gain. We need someone who ensures that our lives and livelihoods are at the forefront of our agenda. The choice is clear -- we need Sri Preston Kulkarni in Congress. And in 74 days, we can send him there, but only with your support. CHIP IN NOW >> Thanks, -- Team Sri Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#] If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: your nomination for President of the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
This campaign is about more than winning an election, it's about deciding who we are as a country. |
---
Peter --

**It is the honor of my lifetime to accept your nomination for President of the United States.**

When I say we are in a battle for the soul of the nation, I mean it. This campaign is about more than winning an election, it's about deciding who we are as a country.

Growing up in Scranton, Pennsylvania, I learned the importance of hard work, treating others with dignity and respect, and leaving no one behind. Those values have guided my entire life. And now, I'm humbled by the responsibility you have entrusted in me to bring these values back to the White House.

Peter, right now we are a country divided, and the world is in disarray. But as my dad always said, "Champ, when you get knocked down, you get back up." And that's what I know we can do as a country -- we can get back up.

But here's the truth: we can only unite the country and win this battle if we work our hearts out every single day between now and November 3rd. And that's what I'm promising to do, my word as a Biden.

**But I need you in this fight with me, Peter. I don 't enjoy asking for your money, but this is a grassroots campaign, and grassroots supporters like you will power us to victory.**

[**If you 're ready to win in November, will you make your first donation to own a piece of this campaign? Anything you can give will make a real difference in this battle for the soul of the nation: **](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS") _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Click here to express donate $25 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $250 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=250&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $500 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=500&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&express_lane=true")

[Click here to donate another amount >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")** Peter, we have the opportunity right now to seize this moment in history and make real change for working people.

In the midst of an economic crisis, a public health crisis, and a renewed call for racial justice, it won't be enough just to build back to where we were before. We have to build America back better.

That's why as President, and with Vice President Kamala Harris by my side, I am committed to making bold, historic investments in our country. We'll create millions of jobs, meet the challenge of climate change, regain America's leadership on the world stage, and more.

Thursday night, I accepted your nomination for President of the United States. Now, I hope you'll accept my challenge:

**Will you do everything you can over the next 73 days to make sure we win the battle for the soul of our nation?**

[**Peter, I hope you 'll make your first donation right now to power this campaign to victory.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B6_JRBaccepts_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

Thank you,

Joe

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b748/1cd0ac28/16bf9c53f/357fede7/3726075821/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b748/1cd0ac28/16bf9c53f/357fede4/3726075821/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b748/1cd0ac28/16bf9c53f/357fede6/3726075821/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b748/1cd0ac28/16bf9c53f/357fede1/3726075821/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President
clean_body: This campaign is about more than winning an election, it's about deciding who we are as a country. | Peter -- It is the honor of my lifetime to accept your nomination for President of the United States. When I say we are in a battle for the soul of the nation, I mean it. This campaign is about more than winning an election, it's about deciding who we are as a country. Growing up in Scranton, Pennsylvania, I learned the importance of hard work, treating others with dignity and respect, and leaving no one behind. Those values have guided my entire life. And now, I'm humbled by the responsibility you have entrusted in me to bring these values back to the White House. Peter, right now we are a country divided, and the world is in disarray. But as my dad always said, "Champ, when you get knocked down, you get back up." And that's what I know we can do as a country -- we can get back up. But here's the truth: we can only unite the country and win this battle if we work our hearts out every single day between now and November 3rd. And that's what I'm promising to do, my word as a Biden. But I need you in this fight with me, Peter. I don 't enjoy asking for your money, but this is a grassroots campaign, and grassroots supporters like you will power us to victory. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Peter, we have the opportunity right now to seize this moment in history and make real change for working people. In the midst of an economic crisis, a public health crisis, and a renewed call for racial justice, it won't be enough just to build back to where we were before. We have to build America back better. That's why as President, and with Vice President Kamala Harris by my side, I am committed to making bold, historic investments in our country. We'll create millions of jobs, meet the challenge of climate change, regain America's leadership on the world stage, and more. Thursday night, I accepted your nomination for President of the United States. Now, I hope you'll accept my challenge: Will you do everything you can over the next 73 days to make sure we win the battle for the soul of our nation? "" Thank you, Joe | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Team Warner
subject: Mark and Doug and Gary and Jeanne and Tina and Cory.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We have a plan to take back the Senate -- and it starts by protecting the folks who are already there.
|
---

| | Derek --

We have a plan to take back the Senate -- and it starts by protecting the folks who are already there.

Republicans are laser-focused on six races: Doug Jones in Alabama, Gary Peters in Michigan, Jeanne Shaheen in New Hampshire, Tina Smith in Minnesota, and Cory Booker in New Jersey. **Losing even one of these seats will seriously threaten our chances of winning back control of the Senate.

[Chip in to help us re-elect Democratic Senators and flip the Senate.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db29/53d9897e/542e4911/1c8832c0/4199103933/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-moneybomb?refcode=20200822_f_1_nd__724__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

This isn't just about Mark Warner's re-election race.** Across the nation, the GOP is targeting Democratic Senators who are up for re-election, looking out for every chance they can get to keep control of the Senate and block any hope of progress. Our path to victory in November must include re-electing these incredible Democratic Senators.

**Here 's the bottom line:** these Senators are folks who show up every day determined to make things right for their constituents and all Americans. And right now, they need our help to keep their seats. If there's any hope of flipping the Senate, it starts with these six Senators.

We simply can't do it without them. **_And they can 't do it without you._**

**If you have the means, please consider chipping in to send these leaders back to Washington.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically processed and split between Mark Warner, Doug Jones, Cory Booker, Jeanne Shaheen, Gary Peters, and Tina Smith._
---

Losing even one of these seats will seriously threaten our chances of winning back control of the Senate. "" This isn't just about Mark Warner's re-election race. Across the nation, the GOP is targeting Democratic Senators who are up for re-election, looking out for every chance they can get to keep control of the Senate and block any hope of progress. Our path to victory in November must include re-electing these incredible Democratic Senators. Here 's the bottom line: these Senators are folks who show up every day determined to make things right for their constituents and all Americans. And right now, they need our help to keep their seats. If there's any hope of flipping the Senate, it starts with these six Senators. We simply can't do it without them. And they can 't do it without you. If you have the means, please consider chipping in to send these leaders back to Washington. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically processed and split between Mark Warner, Doug Jones, Cory Booker, Jeanne Shaheen, Gary Peters, and Tina Smith. "" "" "" "" "" "" We have the chance to make a real change on Election Day -- to take back leadership in the Senate. But to do that, we've got to re-elect the Democratic Senators who are already working hard for us in the Senate. Thank you for your support. -- Team Warner "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c9/18e32a7f/4a3a0fdc/7b20e35e/628291896/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c9/18e32a7f/4a3a0fdc/7b20e35f/628291896/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c9/18e32a7f/4a3a0fdc/7b20e35c/628291896/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c9/18e32a7f/4a3a0fdc/7b20e358/628291896/VEsEBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c9/18e32a7f/4a3a0fdc/7b20e35a/628291896/VEsEBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2c9/18e32a7f/4a3a0fdc/7b20e35d/628291896/VEsEAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: ICYMI: Indiana Unemployment Rate Plummets in July
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Gov. Holcomb is Leading Indiana’s Comeback | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friends,

**In case missed yesterday’s big news:[Indiana’s unemployment plummeted in July,](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=05c733a8e0c049e9a7b506cdd4659a80&_e=449vNdcoplJyJ__ToSAv8T1q1Oe9as2mS1Nl9SZ49AlXpj5Ldtmmgt5WJ-gmzJhLr8MOJ0462ZF0zUYbxr_aebJYNgVC0_4bxTSdNuSz7KtDKRxaT7xLo7DTYY7O2kfB9eE962cEdXr0vWkvufO0-8yRXGnrHTVQNsZEkPuQulzwm-i9bCUD44WiCf-942AU-DNtL2z1HsCC1bP-Yovl6An7nJjq5g_K3-HE6E681nDXwxVc9uElfB3NO9ETgdEOXmt01BRNk7yvz_KLFdJjIX4i0ZYWnM8eOIUW5fFX3N1qA6gSkK7cpN71QGaORtL5Jhz_N1hzQWPoiMeFmBBqtT-gSn3HrVT-lpTibtybRpLVuDHB23op9HBdd4uKdwhYtUKhNg0TdGwUugrRtoEx3WxKyd1md46YHB4LrkIriBwZevMpDWf71eSBWe3bnVgaISfM5ZNqESkeuMPpNBl1Y85o_7nNPdgZyjgPCWtoKYl-Z6IBvf0WROq_t5OSfHN_TgOB-xINJSsVaPT0QqoLdYPoeVE-_kTjKSce8tRw7xI%3D)** falling 3.3% and now standing at a pandemic-period low of 7.8%. The **[Indiana Department of Workforce Development](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=05c733a8e0c049e9a7b506cdd4659a80&_e=449vNdcoplJyJ__ToSAv8TH6KUxVzZfhBhwy53yS6f6MJl3KhFjlioUakyLOJTolzn7EJXqTNBRAKpBXHcQFzV7PTydzuf4QcylOiCXSTwWdxkYZ5Kemhrpo9i82j_y2MGCg0lsik6bPneumo7TwhbxnhEOjMKtzQFz_Em9LIZweUXcy9NZ7LZ8ihD4cJi9Hmc3h89jMpMzwHbXrroIp6mOPzBlO2M8pvW8R2ask2u1H9dsnfHcWhpeo6LxIbrbj1HNV-ZuCOw_nYJB4QxuKQrzOb1aQPL1Xto6o5kphnt-Kqjaay_OQn3BNTsqLBxr1SzGVoNtNs_XlsW4Wy0VRws9bRhI79N1CzTCj0eR2E2qapHmJxpc2eDFAsRgqvhIdQ2GFUCT-ZN15ziBdcp5CuU-I6PQCWeRj04lFh-KtCs0j71k6eb5exZl6fCJ3lQkHNiOKo69SkX0OUL0SIQ2-Yd015rM627BOdrAAWB3c6F2bvCyrQqf6uDM3fCeUdXub)** released the July numbers yesterday. The state’s unemployment figure is now **2.3% below the national average.**

Even though this is race weekend, **Governor Holcomb isn’t taking a victory lap and we’re keeping the pedal to the metal.** However this unemployment report is good news as we’re all working together to get Indiana Back on Track.

Kyle Hupfer, manager of the governor’s reelection campaign, had this to say: **“We’re certainly not out of the woods, but July’s unemployment drop is great news and shows that Governor Holcomb’s measured, data-driven leadership through this pandemic is working for Hoosiers. We’ve seen how quickly COVID-19 can change things, so we’re greeting this news with cautious optimism. However, this is certainly a positive development and I know Hoosiers are glad to be getting back to work.”**

In April, when the state’s economy was essentially shutdown as the coronavirus pandemic took hold, Indiana’s unemployment rate jumped to 16.9%.

**“Safely reopening the economy is the governor’s top priority and yesterday’s news is further proof that Governor Holcomb’s leadership during this unprecedented crisis continues to benefit Hoosiers,”** Hupfer added.

#BackonTrack,

-Your Holcomb Crew

The released the July numbers yesterday. The state’s unemployment figure is now 2.3% below the national average. Even though this is race weekend, Governor Holcomb isn’t taking a victory lap and we’re keeping the pedal to the metal. However this unemployment report is good news as we’re all working together to get Indiana Back on Track. Kyle Hupfer, manager of the governor’s reelection campaign, had this to say: “We’re certainly not out of the woods, but July’s unemployment drop is great news and shows that Governor Holcomb’s measured, data-driven leadership through this pandemic is working for Hoosiers. We’ve seen how quickly COVID-19 can change things, so we’re greeting this news with cautious optimism. However, this is certainly a positive development and I know Hoosiers are glad to be getting back to work.” In April, when the state’s economy was essentially shutdown as the coronavirus pandemic took hold, Indiana’s unemployment rate jumped to 16.9%. “Safely reopening the economy is the governor’s top priority and yesterday’s news is further proof that Governor Holcomb’s leadership during this unprecedented crisis continues to benefit Hoosiers,” Hupfer added. #BackonTrack, -Your Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

[**Yes, I think the Lowcountry is on the right track**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=1f6c2640cf3c44e2a8d58807a1eca229&_e=Ke8gVN8ocK3BRPhH6B9HXxlyfAedvJCtukCFaFBcAKUUYzwrb_gpDN7bZHxSiJxWGGt1KLKpy6saW-KioqUaVZJOzb2iqygE5qSmKRVSE8SPrp63tXyLpVSDspYh9cwguCLFZxpgLwZ6MPFuyLdr_l-VDqpQk9Z5uKmAeRcW8hRk-IWrhVSL5nrxlcVVQAoD68chSMV0TAQqbPdee8ju7z55Qg8UmNqtb2DOXTyl3VdLkt25PJ9pg2vE96Wg-3gnOSgY53KKpLh8Tyg4UdZKH7rMBiT5Slcjt5zOPdVomdNwMRA_IAD6BqRoF4uLLSo8bNUk9wqmQbsgrvmC8JqZQTeaZqiTzGIKT-fnkgvCr71Ooa2CRi3LSCc7yPEzKiqLxUGzHSd07c_t2cBJT8_RhufuqhW81rDKunk7s0O7GZBS8gGN1xziCQh2P6l8fqYKyJiwuWhfdmIgT-rjZX5icv1Htw2qSB1i8n8qKfDvo_c%3D)
[**No, I think the Lowcountry is on the wrong track**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=1f6c2640cf3c44e2a8d58807a1eca229&_e=Ke8gVN8ocK3BRPhH6B9HXxlyfAedvJCtukCFaFBcAKUUYzwrb_gpDN7bZHxSiJxWGGt1KLKpy6saW-KioqUaVZJOzb2iqygE5qSmKRVSE8SPrp63tXyLpVSDspYh9cwg_o345t8r9h_NrkNhyUC00rTO3IR15ro-2REZFeHnBgWGJ5N_ctR2KfRhi8Vt2kMV9esGCW03_6-WGsV-qRfaXV6-yt6K-WabsLZ4PqZgOY7Mlm_q0zM5d83R2e_pxhsGimTXshUgPEGdLhVvbP8bjDIuyLcA7evxWLTqCFuLXNaj7ojLEB3K39mX1X4pYdPiYMILuhJWEbrGqdBJulIqsUnCHe8WwNF2DZKSCw23lkurJhFRi97ejjQlXy5F3_v_p8kQuH9KBGhwES6Ar4lWW55z5Pfdp6O9fQ9qMjY8e0KxsbBqkCpC1C5MdVmNXuUykf2S8eWpkl0SW26LGYquPpkSg061F0ENS1b52zM611c%3D)
The last couple of months have been tough on the families and businesses of the Lowcountry, and we need a real voice on Capitol Hill more than ever.

We’ve been suffering from a leadership crisis, and it’s put our district in a hole.

Our opponent ran as an independent voice for our district, but he lied. Two years later, it’s clear he’s nothing but another progressive House Democrat who functions as a yes man for Nancy Pelosi.

**He’s put his party over the people who sent him to Congress, and that’s hurt our district. **

We need new leadership in Washington, and our district needs a voice who will always put the Lowcountry first — **regardless of political pressure. **

_But we want to know what you think - do you think the Lowcountry is on the right track?_
[**Yes, I think the Lowcountry is on the right track**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=1f6c2640cf3c44e2a8d58807a1eca229&_e=Ke8gVN8ocK3BRPhH6B9HXxlyfAedvJCtukCFaFBcAKUUYzwrb_gpDN7bZHxSiJxWGGt1KLKpy6saW-KioqUaVZJOzb2iqygE5qSmKRVSE8SPrp63tXyLpVSDspYh9cwguCLFZxpgLwZ6MPFuyLdr_l-VDqpQk9Z5uKmAeRcW8hRk-IWrhVSL5nrxlcVVQAoD68chSMV0TAQqbPdee8ju7z55Qg8UmNqtb2DOXTyl3VdLkt25PJ9pg2vE96Wg-3gnOSgY53KKpLh8Tyg4UdZKH2OI69I4ZBzLryhiwAP21oaLf5HV6zvh9vBdJMRYoIBcR2TdgiOxfeD8mkK2_95wWAocDOF3-RRjHSI-CyRGfeBIDbDR5r3idcA3hiHqTB6UMrRlDsiWVJhHWve13zJ4bS7Ge-suCGUd5hXUoacHUvd0RdtqbCkfK5OAqd0GsG_pwdE7CF2TsmvaM06E6_SXSI3lOsBTYNDf99dm2bxy8Tw%3D)

name: [ACA UPDATE] via Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Friend, health care is on the ballot!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
David Perdue and the GOP want to eliminate the ACA. |

Friend,

**Access to affordable health care is at stake this November.**

The Supreme Court just announced they will hear the GOP's arguments to eliminate the Affordable Care Act _the week after the election._

**Friend, who do you trust to provide affordable and accessible health care to the American people if the Supreme Court dismantles the ACA?**

**Donald Trump, David Perdue, and Mitch McConnell -- or _Joe Biden, Jon Ossoff, and a Democratic Senate?_**

We NEED a Democratic Senate for Joe Biden that will fight for the people and ensure everyone's access to affordable health care. **_It really is a matter of life or death._**

Jon's race here in Georgia could decide control of the Senate, _and right now he is deadlocked in the polls with corrupt Senator David Perdue._

**[Friend, can you chip in $10 to power Jon Ossoff to victory and help Democrats gain a Senate majority?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25d9/5b2c1286/3f67d440/25f067e0/2054451097/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_23_scotus_aca?refcode=em_2020_08_23_scotus_aca&amount=10")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Donald Trump, David Perdue, and the GOP have spent years working to gut the ACA, jeopardizing health insurance coverage for millions of Americans.

Perdue opposes Medicaid expansion, and supports the Trump lawsuit that could rip health care away from nearly 500,000 Georgians -- **_DURING A PANDEMIC!_**

_All while taking nearly $300,000 (!!!) from health industry PACs._

**_Friend, David Perdue can't be trusted to protect your health care._**

_But Jon Ossoff can._

Jon's campaign is not taking donations from corporate PACs. Jon will fight for the people and ensure every American has great and affordable health care.

And he will work with the Biden Administration to strengthen and improve the Affordable Care Act, not demolish it.

**[Friend, can you chip in $10 to send an advocate for health care to Washington and help retake the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25d9/5b2c1286/3f67d440/25f067e0/2054451097/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_23_scotus_aca?refcode=em_2020_08_23_scotus_aca&amount=10")**

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Assault on the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Urge Congress to provide critical funding for the Postal Service.
|
---

| | Prescriptions. Social Security checks. Ballots. The list goes on -- those are just a fraction of the vital aspects of everyday life that we depend on the Postal Service to deliver. But changes at the USPS under Donald Trump and by the new Postmaster General Louis DeJoy -- who is from our own 6th District here in North Carolina -- have caused major delivery delays. Now, North Carolinians and Americans across the country are rightfully concerned whether they'll be able to keep their families healthy, pay their bills on time, and vote in the upcoming election. [_**Add your name and urge Congress to provide the additional funding required to save the USPS and ensure voters aren 't disenfranchised in the upcoming election -> **_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2bb/3d199a51/2fa03af2/7364b380/2252022084/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200821pet_nc") President Trump has discredited and attacked voting by mail -- even though he votes by mail -- and now, he's waging war on the Post Office. He doesn't understand that this isn't just about politics. This is about American lives -- about the delivery of medicine, paychecks, and social security payments -- and it's about securing a fair election and protecting our democracy. [_**Add your name to mine and urge Congress to provide critical funding to save the Postal Service.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2bb/3d199a51/2fa03af2/7364b380/2252022084/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200821pet_nc") Thank you, Kathy |
---

name: My Faith Votes
subject: A Family Devotional Guide - Why Should We Vote?
body:
| | Peter, As we approach the elections, parents and grandparents have an excellent opportunity to teach their children about why we vote. We are offering you a phenomenal free fourteen-day family devotional resource to help guide this important conversation. If you don’t have young children or grandchildren, share this with someone who does. The future of our country depends on the next generation of faith voters and leaders. Voter Registration Sunday is September 20, 2020. Now is the time to help activate those in your church to register and vote. Join us this coming Tuesday, August 25, for a live webinar on how to host a Voter Registration Sunday drive, in-person or online, at your church. We recently had two great conversations with Phil Robertson of Duck Dynasty, and Ken Harrison, President of Promise Keepers Ministry. These conversations will challenge you to keep standing for truth and encourage you to remember our heavenly citizenship. Click on each image to access the content. | [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk7dCg1thFzBZiqLuYRLPpJ_aHCKCWDrLcQEL7TYWkbyiHa_t43PzNA6KE-JPldkBWXVpEmDVPSZnkmrsVPn8E5g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200822com01&n=1) | [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iR7QgeULlUKq5LDgOId1OyUeA5HHZHakCKZYaIe7ehIsmUdTFopHrG4XOKTtwwMgv6BxzaX5OJ6PYL_kqC5UIlg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200822com01&n=2)
---|---

**Pray. Think. Vote**

If you agree, add your name to our petition to demand that the President and Postmaster General reverse course and undo all the damage they have done to the USPS NOW.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDu-vwqLvT_zFVnml_X30AvrftkqHK3yyebzW3ytf2eJnU8f04X-WbHfp19H70xqQWErYnPEJQE1OMvJ92WX5QVjeEVOfsAWA3CVMK3YRRB3u-eE_vMUuJlR1vcr_zqcJFr5RN3OegNJhaPr2o2kfTB8MD__dvcKCNqdgALUus_NXUu5ihJoPfIPNp8D5RJqjL3iL4-QlZwdHzP5sTVMaJqpUMIC7yrrx4uArkBwiZpkUgMDdN22jvpXLVHohdcxBr6D9896HtQrrX_0aROqEUyGwQn6UbArdOL_Dw5zXbuZ4tGPiBoJP0f1zYZNL5-_5nMdaraI4lPEddiStULqftjkEfT7iW45bppRXIfxQJhabZDx0XOlWh052sXoD77RXg1Aj6CyqpWNlpYwijNjOdpoV5_e3vTQlSdLYqgAGFJEdP9xG9yE28NqvNU6oKEj7SVDFPTSWmY2QUJYWJX6GlvtQ/34j/P8o_lZh7R-yujDzANzlCLw/h1/_r4aR4QEmtyBNNldOs1kXwoE3HZywPcT6VNjdlpWQlM)** \- Team Mondaire

_Original message:_ Friends, Since we announced our lawsuit on Monday, Postmaster General DeJoy said yesterday that the USPS will postpone operational changes until after the election. **We’re glad DeJoy has taken notice of our lawsuit.‬ This is a good first step, but it doesn’t undo the damage already done. We’ll still be proceeding with our case.** Under DeJoy, the USPS has deliberately reduced its letter-carrying capacity by ripping out postal boxes and removing or destroying 671 mail sorting machines. He also stopped granting overtime pay to employees. **DeJoy must commit to reversing all of the damage he’s done. We cannot assume this administration will stick to its word, and we will not turn back now.** **[Add your name to our petition to demand that Postmaster DeJoy _immediately_ start working to reverse the damage already done and fully restore the USPS’ funding.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDu-vwqLvT_zFVnml_X30AvrftkqHK3yyebzW3ytf2eJnU8f04X-WbHfp19H70xqQWErYnPEJQE1OMvJ92WX5QVjeEVOfsAWA3CVMK3YRRB3u-eE_vMUuJlR1vcr_zqcJFr5RN3OegNJhaPr2o2kfTB8My0A06NgnXzKZIzSM4bvFgGXofxeV3t_Vk0xjERzBzXrmjhwfO9K2bNeHINreIdKN7UKolE0MhFkoyqxQ9wrYr6sPO0jHXdhhmjz5nun8gSIRdqPUxPeT0I6RcsAz-wOHT-OWf4HlxFzipjm4uCnwoYmgAeWUQV9t8b6tXOIpQrN2TJPdCnAwMbx7hkb9IPlpzp0nFRGn4GK6eqyySFAh9NsPCC-A4N6qVoPaQgfS4t6-oCOPKNtmc1CUylqYYYVPfSe7cUUDXP3ZrIe7G15YscGLwL2Q6-P9E1Z2dvA-gGtrmTfSu5u1Cv_UwFLrWx_g/34j/P8o_lZh7R-yujDzANzlCLw/h2/UcglBd5tMbc9479BK8MXXHy9SMxuLjF66tL21cDCd2k)** Thank you again for your support. Onward, Mondaire [ADD YOUR NAME](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDu-vwqLvT_zFVnml_X30AvrftkqHK3yyebzW3ytf2eJnU8f04X-WbHfp19H70xqQWErYnPEJQE1OMvJ92WX5QVjeEVOfsAWA3CVMK3YRRB3u-eE_vMUuJlR1vcr_zqcJFr5RN3OegNJhaPr2o2kfTB8Ng5OiorVop-dcLnnsazgLQ3UFaajtGGtvkOy0XnVvvqRQUBSHM3UtgTcqztM9CO29lEtKTjBQiIXv40rKID3HjvijmhlsJdwTZih35QYUACm-gTJyR6OCNgUqLXlz9-w2zui_jCoAShlPZLhcOjFXZLQwtx5vWsUsrILe3hz0YhwLjRT4x5liFdOpW7bErTxJo-eQX6lvZEtlfd_Sdwc-rozz7hgnG0qkgYVXqu0bUvsYo9YzxJaups3BjZySuC007RI9nlYJSf-I5ASO8YXbjfpJjwkKY1pnRgAU2Mb9K8Lit7VEXmtUJqYbD7a04MSw/34j/P8o_lZh7R-yujDzANzlCLw/h3/U_LMMM9LB_uCa85vjbs6hL9oCrGjYv-FeKD8VbydObg)

clean_body: DeJoy and Trump have no plans to reverse the damage they’ve already done. | | | Friends, we just wanted to make sure you saw Mondaire’s update regarding the lawsuit and the ongoing situation with the USPS. Although Postmaster General DeJoy said he would postpone operational changes until after the election, he and Donald Trump are refusing to reverse the damage they have already done. \- Team Mondaire Original message: Friends, Since we announced our lawsuit on Monday, Postmaster General DeJoy said yesterday that the USPS will postpone operational changes until after the election. We’re glad DeJoy has taken notice of our lawsuit.‬ This is a good first step, but it doesn’t undo the damage already done. We’ll still be proceeding with our case. Under DeJoy, the USPS has deliberately reduced its letter-carrying capacity by ripping out postal boxes and removing or destroying 671 mail sorting machines. He also stopped granting overtime pay to employees. DeJoy must commit to reversing all of the damage he’s done. We cannot assume this administration will stick to its word, and we will not turn back now. ** Thank you again for your support. We must remain vigilant and ensure that we preserve both the sanctity of the USPS and the integrity of the November elections. Onward, Mondaire Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

Leading starts with listening – that’s why I want to know which issues are on your mind ahead of November’s rapidly-approaching elections. [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=b8b16fe8c2814ea3a472a8c61d772c4d&_e=vpanAaiUWdOc8SCPUX8RPuBy0DehAq0XHTg-9ZdoeOgOJdwzfqlaBycozyZ0rEB8O7jdGwkiSNHwXp6XhV_X0Bkl8TIy_x5ImlRMt0o7vhBnemxKYqfe27UxCYpbIP0HqEXcvwnOabRTxqwlsqugU2Y2OmgYAM1yTUYkeoaHUrQwc5NwSRLxZqqh-va7vuVcaMz0aDkHdfHeboeIf_VkocSNqRuf7Bfe_oKaevZWDx5pUAoDfECyokW6soQnYd5Fqs894_MNM6NU01Ql9Wbk_5_0zOG_o89kI8bdx514xNJjgDj04Oy4_9tplbd2DvbWY7s0EVLVRviBWcLIztljsTNgmn6eZKG_P5MsAMuyMMQmareXfSKxK9SWifIa4nmgPAiTmOMbUNxBcstHOFiBuA4XRQ1eRFeIM1v36i8aiUd2ybgwLr1BTtaRuxINJeV2uaV7hwW43r7NLxtFiXLQ7MrIBD45XM54UAt9aZ9xVpQ%3D) | |

Friend,

**It’s been a challenging year for Americans all around the country. **

_Countless Americans have faced the harsh realities of unemployment._
_Countless Americans have watched their own cities be overrun by violent protesters._
_Countless Americans have learned the true intentions of the Chinese Communist Party._

_But most importantly..._

**Countless Americans have realized that voting this year is more important than ever before.**

Friend, that’s why I’m reaching out to you today with just one simple question:

Which issue is driving you to vote on November 3rd?

clean_body: Leading starts with listening – that’s why I want to know which issues are on your mind ahead of November’s rapidly-approaching elections. | | Friend, It’s been a challenging year for Americans all around the country. Countless Americans have faced the harsh realities of unemployment. Countless Americans have watched their own cities be overrun by violent protesters. Countless Americans have learned the true intentions of the Chinese Communist Party. But most importantly... Countless Americans have realized that voting this year is more important than ever before. Friend, that’s why I’m reaching out to you today with just one simple question: Which issue is driving you to vote on November 3rd? Overcoming the challenges we’ve faced this year starts with electing the strongest, most qualified, conservative leaders (not career politicians) who have what it takes to lead Illinois and America. I believe that leading starts with listening – and I need to hear what voters like you have to say right now as we’re running down the homestretch of this election season. Thank you, Darin LaHood | | | Paid for by LaHood for Congress | | P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: kindly asking you to complete our new survey

body:
Now that the nomination process is concluded, we want to directly get your thoughts. |
---
Peter,

Wow. We're still in awe of the outpouring of grassroots support behind the Biden-Harris ticket after this past week's Democratic National Convention!

This pandemic may have kept us all out of the same room during convention week, but it couldn't stop the wave of momentum building across the country as Democrats came together in every state and territory to nominate the next President and Vice President.

Now that the nomination process is concluded, we want to directly get your thoughts on this past week and what you believe we need to do to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.

[**We 're hoping to get 20,000 responses from Pennsylvania to our post-convention recap survey before midnight. Peter, can you weigh in on your thoughts on the convention right now?**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb0e/2555675495/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-post-convention-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.22_B1_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.22_B1_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | **POST-CONVENTION RECAP SURVEY

Supporter:** [Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb0e/2555675495/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-post-convention-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.22_B1_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.22_B1_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
**Average Survey Completion Time:** 2-4 minutes
**Responses Needed From Pennsylvania:** 20,000
---
| [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb0d/2555675495/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-post-convention-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.22_B1_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.22_B1_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
It's important that we get your feedback on your favorite speakers and the issues that got you most fired up to be a Democrat so we can plan the best online content for the weeks ahead leading up to Election Day.

**Don 't close your inbox today without taking this important survey -- click below to get started:**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Post-Convention-Survey**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb0e/2555675495/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-post-convention-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.22_B1_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.22_B1_postconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Thank you for being a part of the team,

JoeBiden.com
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb0c/2555675495/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb0b/2555675495/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb0a/2555675495/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb09/2555675495/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb08/2555675495/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb07/2555675495/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb06/2555675495/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb05/2555675495/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb04/2555675495/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb03/2555675495/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb06/2555675495/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b76f/1cd0ac28/16b26ff6b/357feb01/2555675495/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Lee Zeldin
subject: my friend Andrew Garbarino
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |

| | Peter, I was just alerted of some disturbing news:

Don Bacon just bought **$59,629** of TV airtime for THIS WEEK to destroy my chances of winning.

_That 's $8,518 worth of ads a day._

I have one of the best shots in the country to unseat a Republican and he is terrified. [**_I only have until 11pm today to raise $8,518 to counter his attacks. So I 'm asking: Will you rush me $12?_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e812/77d4c309/218b9e65/26361652/54541734/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200822_em_fr_b1_kara_all_rs&amount=12&amounts=25,50,100,250") I can't overstate how important your support is. I'm not taking a dime of corporate PAC money and the next 10 hours will determine if I can fight back.

If I let these ads go unanswered, I will lose this race. Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e812/77d4c309/218b9e65/2636165a/54541734/VEsHBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. clean_body: | | | Peter, I was just alerted of some disturbing news: Don Bacon just bought $59,629 of TV airtime for THIS WEEK to destroy my chances of winning. That 's $8,518 worth of ads a day. I have one of the best shots in the country to unseat a Republican and he is terrified. "" I can't overstate how important your support is. I'm not taking a dime of corporate PAC money and the next 10 hours will determine if I can fight back. At this very moment, voters watching CNN and NBC are being pummeled with attack ads targeting me. If I let these ads go unanswered, I will lose this race. I can't do this alone, so I'm humbly asking, Peter: "" Every dollar spent NOW is critical in determining who will win this race. The GOP isn't wasting a second -- and we can't either. I need you to chip in $12 now and I know we can catch up: | | "" "" "" "" "" "" I couldn't do this without you, Kara | "" "" "" Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines. name: Team Ossoff
subject: we'll be brief
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Jon will deliver results. |
---
Friend -- We know you get lots of emails, so we'll make this one quick.

**Jon Ossoff is running for Senate because he believes:**
* everyone deserves to have affordable health care
* we need to invest in clean energy and infrastructure
* and we have to root out corruption and get dark money out of politics
**The people of Georgia deserve real leaders who will work to make our government better serve the people -- and who will move away from the divisive, me-first politics of Donald Trump and David Perdue.**

**[This campaign is building a growing coalition with the resources and momentum to win in Georgia and turn the Senate blue. Will you support our efforts to elect Jon and deliver results for the people of Georgia?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e25c6/5b2c1286/3f6b1fa6/25f065b1/436195983/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_13_gen_fr?refcode=em_2020_08_22_gen_fr")**
