name: me, MJ Hegar
subject: The center of it all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddd4/395125046/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddcb/395125046/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200822.3nd__1977__&amount=10")
---
Look, Peter, _CNN_ reported that "it's a *really* big deal that Texas is now a 2020 swing state." Folks all across America are realizing what you and I have known all along: **_Texas is winnable,_ and this is the year we do it. [Pitch in >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddcb/395125046/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200822.3nd__1977__&amount=10")**

I'm going to need your help to make it happen. Sen. Cornyn has over $14.5 million in his war chest, and you can be sure that his corporate PACs, the big-money donors, and the Koch network don't want to see Mitch McConnell's right-hand man lose in November. They're spending left and right to save their spineless bootlicker, but I've got something way better than them. I have this team -- thousands of y'all who care enough to donate their time and money to flip Texas and the Senate.

**[Will you step up, join my team of over 56,000 grassroots donors and rise up against Sen. Cornyn's big-money backers?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddcb/395125046/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200822.3nd__1977__&amount=10")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddca/395125046/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200822.3nd__1977__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddc9/395125046/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200822.3nd__1977__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddc8/395125046/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200822.3nd__1977__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddcf/395125046/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200822.3nd__1977__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddce/395125046/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200822.3nd__1977__")**
\-- MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddcb/395125046/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200822.3nd__1977__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddcd/395125046/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1977&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e1b/7f51f7bc/43e934b9/4ef7ddcc/395125046/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Biden-Harris 2020
subject: A surge of new momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Our grassroots donors are funding a path to victory in the battleground states. |
---
Peter, thanks again for helping to make this past week's Democratic Convention a huge success! Because of the energy of grassroots supporters like you, **we 're heading into the general election with a surge of new momentum.**

We're strong in the polls, our grassroots donors are funding a path to victory in the battleground states, and we're ready to take the fight to Trump in these last 73 days of the campaign.

**Early voting starts in less than one month in some states, so there is no time to waste:** we need to build on this moment, and accelerate our efforts across the country.

[Peter, help us take our campaign to the next level by chipping in your first $25 today. Every dollar you give will go straight towards funding new ads, organizing, and Get Out the Vote efforts that will push Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to victory >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B2_surging_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B2_surging_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | **Supporter:** [Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B2_surging_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.22_B2_surging_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

subject: Stopping Sex Trafficking - My Conversation with Jaco Booyens
body:
Watch this amazing conversation I had with Jaco Booyens on stopping Sex Trafficking! | | | |
---
| **Stopping Sex Trafficking**
---
| | |
---
| **Hi Friends! Watch this amazing conversation with Jaco Booyens on stopping Sex Trafficking. You have got to see this!**

**Jaco is a tremendous man of God, and activist against sex trafficking. He is the president of the film company After Eden Pictures. He directed and produced the film, 8 DAYS, to raise awareness about the reality of Sex Trafficking in the United States and is the founder of SHAREtogether, a non-profit organization fighting against the global crisis of Sex Trafficking. We talked about his story, what is happening with sex trafficking in America, and how to end it in our generation.**

**Click the Blue Conversation Link button below, watch the interview, and email me with any of your thoughts.**

**Check out more of what Jaco is doing and support his ministry by visiting sharetogethernow.org

Below is a picture of Jaco and I at an event where I had the privilege to meet him. I also had the privilege to meet Esther Joy King - who is a phenomenal candidate for US Congress in the 17th district. Esther has a wonderful shot win on November 3rd, and I am rooting for her and her campaign! You can find her at estherforcongress.com

#BeBold
-Jerry Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=72c7a64bf5&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=31037991e4&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**

clean_body: Watch this amazing conversation I had with Jaco Booyens on stopping Sex Trafficking! | | | | | Stopping Sex Trafficking | | | | Hi Friends! Watch this amazing conversation with Jaco Booyens on stopping Sex Trafficking. You have got to see this! Jaco is a tremendous man of God, and activist against sex trafficking. He is the president of the film company After Eden Pictures. He directed and produced the film, 8 DAYS, to raise awareness about the reality of Sex Trafficking in the United States and is the founder of SHAREtogether, a non-profit organization fighting against the global crisis of Sex Trafficking. We talked about his story, what is happening with sex trafficking in America, and how to end it in our generation. Click the Blue Conversation Link button below, watch the interview, and email me with any of your thoughts. Check out more of what Jaco is doing and support his ministry by visiting sharetogethernow.org Below is a picture of Jaco and I at an event where I had the privilege to meet him. I also had the privilege to meet Esther Joy King - who is a phenomenal candidate for US Congress in the 17th district. Esther has a wonderful shot win on November 3rd, and I am rooting for her and her campaign! You can find her at estherforcongress.com #BeBold -Jerry Evans Please check out my to learn more about me and for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey. | "Conversation Link" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 - Jerry Evans for Illinois, All rights reserved.
